visual_description: The audio is dominated by a high-energy, electronic music track with a driving, percussive beat. The music has a tense and suspenseful mood, creating a sense of urgency and anticipation, as if building up to a confrontation or a significant event. There is no dialogue or narration in the clip. The video opens with a shaky, handheld shot in a dimly lit, narrow corridor. The scene is bathed in a cool, blue-green light. In the foreground, a man in a dark suit is seen from the side, walking away from the camera. In the background, another man in a light-colored suit is partially visible. The camera pans slightly to the right, following the movement. On the left side of the screen, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in a white, stylized font. The camera cuts to a clearer, medium shot of two men walking down a dark, grimy hallway. The man in the foreground, who is older with graying hair, wears a light-colored suit jacket over a collared shirt. He looks forward with a serious expression.
